summary: Completed comprehensive mobile responsiveness testing for PortfolioHealth Advisor. All mobile and desktop views tested successfully with no critical issues found.
passed_tests: Landing page mobile (390x844): Header not overlapping, logo visible, CTA cards stack vertically
Landing page desktop (1920x800): Company name visible in header, CTA cards side by side
Login page mobile: Mobile logo visible above form, glass inputs work, login with admin@ppdt.com / Admin123! successful
Login page desktop: 3D liquid glass shapes visible on left, mobile logo hidden
Register page mobile: Mobile logo visible above form
Dashboard mobile: Hamburger menu visible and functional, stat cards in 2-col grid, sidebar opens/closes properly
Dashboard desktop: Floating glass sidebar visible with logo and nav links
Quick Assessment flow mobile: Intro form works, all 15 questions answerable, results page displays correctly with radar chart
Companies page mobile: Full-width Add Company button, company cards stack vertically
Assessments page mobile: Full-width New Assessment button, table has horizontal scroll container

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all mobile and desktop responsive tests passed)

seed_data_creation: Created test quick assessment for 'Test Mobile Company' during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile responsiveness testing complete. Key responsive features verified: (1) sm: breakpoints for responsive headers, (2) 2-col stat grid on mobile dashboard, (3) full-width buttons on mobile for Companies and Assessments pages, (4) mobile logo on login/register pages (lg:hidden), (5) hamburger menu with sliding sidebar on mobile, (6) horizontal scroll for tables on mobile. All glassmorphism theme elements from iteration_2 still working correctly on both viewports.

visual_verification.mobile_landing_page: Header with logo (no company name on mobile), hero section with stacked CTA cards, responsive text sizes
visual_verification.mobile_login_page: Mobile logo above form, glass input fields, full-width Sign In button
visual_verification.mobile_register_page: Mobile logo above form, glass input fields, full-width Create Account button
visual_verification.mobile_dashboard: Hamburger menu header, 2-col stat card grid, sliding sidebar with overlay
visual_verification.mobile_quick_assessment: Responsive form, progress bar, question options, results with radar chart
visual_verification.mobile_companies_page: Full-width Add Company button, stacked company cards
visual_verification.mobile_assessments_page: Full-width New Assessment button, horizontally scrollable table
visual_verification.desktop_landing_page: Full header with company name, side-by-side CTA cards
visual_verification.desktop_login_page: 3D liquid glass shapes on left, form on right
visual_verification.desktop_dashboard: Floating glass sidebar always visible, 4-col stat grid
